name: git-main-sync-ff
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>act>verify>handoff | scope: repo | policy: ff-only,safety-first,deterministic-output | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: SOURCE_BRANCH
required_inputs.description: Branch to fast-forward into target branch.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_BRANCH
required_inputs.description: Target branch to update. Default: main.

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote to push target branch. Default: origin.
